---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the feature

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Why is it useful

<!-- What problem does it solve? Concrete user scenarios are 10× more
     useful than abstract reasoning here. -->

## How would it work

<!-- Sketch the UX. Don't worry about implementation — just what the
     user does and what they see. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other ways could this need be met? Why not those? -->

## Phase / scope

- [ ] Bug fix / polish (small)
- [ ] Phase 2 (current cycle)
- [ ] Phase 3 (Apple Intelligence / BYO-LLM)
- [ ] Phase 4+ (cross-platform, plugin system)
- [ ] Out of scope per [`PLAN.md`](../../PLAN.md) — please reconsider

If you're not sure, leave blank and we'll triage.
